title: Better Advancements
description: Enhance Minecraft with 80+ brand new Advancements, all in the vanilla style.
body:
# Better Advancements

Are you a fan of Vanilla Advancements, but feel like something's missing? This pack adds 65+ brand new Advancements to your world in a way that's true to the base game. Perfect for both singleplayer and SMP worlds.

## What Does It Add?
The Datapack currently adds 11 Story Advancements, 43 Adventure Advancements, 15 Husbandry Advancements, 6 End Advancements and 5 Nether Advancements! Most of these Advancements can be completed by simply playing the game and exploring the world, but some will require more effort and dedication to achieve. Will you rise to the challenge? The Datapack also includes a built-in counter, so you can compete with friends to see who can finish all 196 Advancements first!


## Colored Advancements
This pack also has full support for the Resource Pack [Colored Advancements](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colored_advancements), which makes all Advancements have their own color to go with them.



## Commands & Config

```/trigger advancements``` - this allows you to see how many Advancments you currently have completed per tab or frame, as well as a total of all your finished Advancements and how many you have left to complete.

```/trigger advancements.config``` - allows you to change personal settings for the datapack as well as some global settings (Operator only). For info on all the commands, click [here](https://github.com/LuigiTime34/better-advancements/wiki/Commands) for a detailed look.

## 

<details>
<summary>FAQ</summary>

- **Are you going to backport to 1.1X.X?** While I don't plan on making different versions for the older Minecraft releases, I do plan on being up to date when a new update comes out.

- **Wait a minute. Isn't there a mod called this too?** The mod Better Advancements was made known to me after the development and creation of this pack, and therefore is unaffiliated with it.

- **Is there a documentation for all of the Advancements added?** Yes! You can check out the [complete wiki on Github.](https://github.com/LuigiTime34/better-advancements/wiki)
- **Didn't there use to be a hardcore version?** Yes, there was, but it was discontiuned after removing all Advancements requiring death.
</details>
